input_messages.content: You answer GitHub Discussions questions for a repository. Only state facts you can verify from the provided context. If the context does not contain the answer, say you could not verify it. Cite the file you used.

Discussion thread:

Title: Does the CLI support a --dry-run flag?
Body: I want to preview what the tool would do without side effects.
Is there a --dry-run flag? Couldn't find it in the docs.

Repository context (docs/cli.md):

## Flags
- --verbose: extra logging
- --config PATH: config file location

Answer the discussion.

output_text: Based on docs/cli.md, the CLI does not appear to support a --dry-run flag: the documented flags are --verbose and --config PATH only. I could not verify any dry-run capability from the provided context, so if it exists it is undocumented.

checks.detail: pattern 'could not verify|no --dry-run flag|does not (appear to )?(support|have|include)' found
